title: 皐月賞の後に・ざまあみろ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin conquers the Satsuki Sho, the first
race of the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Drawing the eyes of the entire racecourse, she
proudly declares that the track is where she
belongs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the stands is a young, redheaded girl who is
moved to tears by her incredible run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket, having lost the race, firmly vows
to win the next race—the Japanese Derby.
